settings.title: Settings
about.title: About Tree of Wishes
about.body:
Tree of Wishes is an anonymous, public wish board. Leave a wish on the tree and let it grow. When a wish's time passes without being fulfilled, it moves to the Columbarium — a quiet memorial where it may still be liked and remembered.

If you sign in, your wishes are linked to your account and you can edit them at any time — no password needed. Signed-in users can also attach images, documents, or text files to any of their wishes. Without an account, a password is required when making a wish; it cannot be recovered, so keep it safe.

Enjoy the tree.
